mapper.sql: id, user_id, provider_type, api_key_enc, base_url, default_model, is_default, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_providers WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM user_providers WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_providers (id, user_id, provider_type, api_key_enc, base_url, default_model, is_default) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{providerType}, #{apiKeyEnc}, #{baseUrl}, #{defaultModel}, #{defaultProvider})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_providers SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1
